- Buy volume from public: $2.1M (6,781 wallets)
- Sell volume from public: $0
- Deployer sold $2.1M using their approved status
- LP lock creates confidence signal; whitelist creates exit barrier

samples.label: honeypot
samples.token_data:
Token: SELLBLOCK/ETH Pool (Uniswap V2)
Liquidity Pool Analysis:
- Pool TVL: $1,600,000 — LP locked on Unicrypt for 6 months
- LP depth appears fine: $1.6M in pool
- Sell function calls admin contract which always returns false
- Pool is accessible in principle but sell approval always denied
- Buy volume: $1.3M from 2,109 wallets
- Sell volume: $0 from regular wallets
- Admin approval contract: programmed to return false for all callers
- Deployer sold $1.28M via internal bypass that skips approval check

samples.label: rug_pull
samples.token_data:
Token: GHOSTMINT/BNB Pool (PancakeSwap V2)
Liquidity Pool Analysis:
- Initial LP: $310,000 (50% of presale, rest to dev)
- LP lock: NONE — held in deployer wallet
- Day 1: dev dumped 80% of holdings, pool drained to $4,200
- LP then removed: $4,200 extracted (rest already worthless)
- Total loss: $620,000 (presale funds + LP)
- Post-rug: pool shows as active on PancakeSwap (ghost listing)
- Red flag pre-launch: no lock contract deployed despite promises
- Dev wallet: 0 prior on-chain history, funded via mixer

samples.label: safe
samples.token_data:
Token: QUANTUM/USDC Pool (Uniswap V3)
Liquidity Pool Analysis:
- Pool TVL: $19,200,000 — largest pool in this dataset
- LP providers: 1,400 independent addresses
- Largest single LP: 2.8% of pool (verified market maker)
- 24-month track record — zero LP manipulation events
- Volume/TVL: 0.25 (healthy)
- Price impact $1M trade: 1.8%
- Used as Aave V3 collateral: $42M borrowed against QUANTUM
- Annual LP fee revenue: $7.4M distributed to 1,400 providers

samples.label: wash_trading
samples.token_data:
Token: CIRCUITBREAK/BNB Pool (PancakeSwap V2)
Liquidity Pool Analysis:
- Pool TVL: $210,000 (deployer-controlled)
- Claimed volume: $48,000,000/day (CoinGecko ranking: #54)
- Volume/TVL ratio: 228x — physically impossible
- Analysis: 6-wallet closed loop, each trade $8M, completing 6-hop cycle in 18 seconds
- All 'volume' reverts to same starting wallet
- Net pool reserve change after 1 day: $0 (circular, no real pressure)
- LP provider: 1 (deployer only)
- Purpose: achieve CoinGecko top 100 by volume to attract retail listings

samples.label: honeypot
samples.token_data:
Token: AIRDROPRUG/BNB Pool (PancakeSwap V2)
Liquidity Pool Analysis:
- Pool TVL: $4,100,000 — LP locked via Team Finance for 1 year
- LP lock appears legitimate and credible
- Pool depth: appears healthy at $4.1M
- Buy volume: $3.2M from regular buyers (all trapped, blacklisted)
- Sell volume from public: $0 (blacklisted on purchase)
- Insider sells (whitelisted airdrop recipients): $3.2M successfully sold
- Pool TVL grew from insider buys used as liquidity seed
- Pattern: locked LP used to signal legitimacy; insider whitelist enables exit
